sglang.title: Improve process creation
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Simplify the process creation process
Rename controller to scheduler
Use LimitedCapacityDict in DetokenizerManager
Temporarily disable data parallelism

sglang.title: fix ipv6 url when warm up model
sglang.author: cauyxy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
BUG i encountered:
File "/home/tiger/.local/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py", line 435, in prepare_url
raise InvalidURL(*e.args)
requests.exceptions.InvalidURL: Failed to parse: http://fdbd:dc05:8:8::24:10052/get_model_info
Modifications

Checklist

[ x ] Format your code

sglang.title: Move scheduler code from tp_worker.py to scheduler.py
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt: We want to make a cleaner separation between the scheduler and the model worker, so we move most scheduling code from tp_worker.py to scheduler.py

sglang.title: Process image in parallel
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

The current multi-image process is not truly parallelized.
Modifications

Model: lmms-lab/llava-onevision-qwen2-0.5b-ov, image num: 10
Before: process time: 1.92s, e2e time: 2.53s
After: process time: 0.34s, e2e time: 0.99s
This PR also moves the image process into a dependent module and

sglang.title: Let ModelRunner take InputMetadata as input, instead of ScheduleBatch
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Let ModelRunner take InputMetadata as input, instead of ScheduleBatch. This makes a better separation between scheduling and model forward pass.
Delete the deprecated position_ids_offsets

vllm.title: [BugFix] Fix seeded random sampling with encoder-decoder models
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Currently providing the seed parameter with encoder-decoder models including the llama-3.2-vision ones will crash the server.
Planning to follow up with some better test coverage and hopefully some changes to make the implementation less fragile, but would be good to get this fix in quickly.
Thanks

vllm.title: [Misc] Fix typo in BlockSpaceManagerV1
vllm.author: juncheoll
vllm.bodyExcerpt: It's just fix the typo in BlockSpaceManagerV1._allocate_last_physical_block()

vllm.title: [Kernel][Model] Varlen prefill + Prefill chunking support for mamba kernels and Jamba model
vllm.author: mzusman
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR contains variable length and prefill chunking enablement for the mamba kernels (causal_conv1d.cu and mamba_ssm.cu):

Causal conv1d and mamba ssm prefill kernels now accept 3 new arguments :


cu_seq_len  - cumulative sequence lenghts, indicates the bos and eos of each sequence in the unpadde
